evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: ## LICENSE This software is licensed under the [BSD 3-Clause License](http://opensource.org/licenses/BSD-3-Clause). Please refer to the separate [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for the exact text of the license. You are obligated to give attribution if you use this code.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: ## ABOUT yelpapi is a pure Python implementation of the [Yelp Fusion API](https://docs.developer.yelp.com/docs/fusion-intro). It is simple, fast, and robust to any changes Yelp may make to the API in the future.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: ## REQUIREMENTS This code requires Python 3.9 or higher and [requests](https://github.com/requests/requests).

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: ## USING THIS CODE This API is demonstrated more thoroughly in [examples.py](examples/examples.py), but the following chunk of code demonstrates basic use of yelpapi:

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: ```python from yelpapi import YelpAPI with YelpAPI(api_key) as yelp_api: search_results = yelp_api.search_query(args) ```

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: You can also set timeouts so API calls do not block indefinitely in degraded network conditions:

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: ```python from yelpapi import YelpAPI with YelpAPI(api_key, timeout_s=3.0) as yelp_api: search_results = yelp_api.search_query(args) ```
